ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Have you lost someone significant to you?
How many months has it been since your significant other died?
Notes: Months since bereavement date is rounded. If the research participant is 15-days-bereaved at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-bereaved, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel yourself longing or yearning for the person who died?

For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you have trouble doing the things you normally do because you are thinking so much about the person who died?

For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel confused about your role in life or feel like you don't know who you are any more (i.e., feeling like that a part of you has died) ?
For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you have trouble believing that the person who died is really gone?
For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you avoid reminders that the person who died is really gone?
For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel emotional pain (e.g., anger, bitterness, sorrow) related to the death?

For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel that you have trouble re-engaging in life (e.g., problems engaging with friends, pursuing interests, planning for the future)?
For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel emotionally numb or detached from others?
For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel that life is meaningless without the person who died?
For each item, indicate how you currently feel. Since the death, or as a result of the death - Do you feel alone or lonely without the deceased?
Have the symptoms above caused significant impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning?
